title: rosa canina var. mandonii
intro: Rosa canina var. mandonii, also known as the dwarf dog rose or Rosa canina, is a compact, deciduous shrub native to the Iberian Peninsula in southwestern Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of vitamins A and C, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rosa canina var. mandonii include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress, as well as its potential to support cardiovascular health and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Rosa canina var. mandonii is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
